name: Ice Cream Wafers
recipeInstructions:
Cream the butter and shortening until smooth. Gradually add sugar, beating well after each addition. Mix in the flour and salt until a dough forms. Stir in lemon extract and vanilla extract.
Scoop the batter using rounded teaspoonfuls onto lightly greased baking sheets, spacing them about 2 inches apart. Press one pecan half into the center of each cookie.
Bake at 350°F for 8 minutes or until lightly browned. Allow to cool on wire racks for a minute before removing completely. Store in an airtight container for up to 1 week. These freeze well for months. Yields about 2 1/2 dozen cookies.
